title: Add LIFE Pro - Large Image Fast Engine Processor to Dev_Tools
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: LIFE in the fast lane
gist.blurb: Added LIFE Pro to the Dev Tools collection. Perfect for when your images are measured in gigabytes, not megabytes.
gist.summary: Added LIFE Pro (Large Image Fast Engine) to the Dev Tools section for handling multi-GB image files.
gist.impact: Developers and artists can now easily access a tool optimized for viewing and processing massive TIFF and PSB files.
gist.visual_concept: The concept focuses on the 'heavy lifting' aspect of large image processing being made easy. Polly the Bee and the Monitor Robot are effortlessly carrying a comically large, beautiful painting or digital canvas, symbolizing the tool's ability to handle massive files with ease.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and the chunky robot companion effortlessly carrying a gigantic, ornate picture frame displaying a detailed landscape. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'LIFE PRO'. Nostalgic, helpful, and emotionally warm.
